summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Prawn/Aquaculture Export ERP system. All core modules tested successfully including authentication, agent management, procurement with auto-calculations, preprocessing with yield tracking, production orders, finished goods inventory, and dashboard statistics. System is production-ready with 100% backend API success rate.

design_issues.issue: React console warnings for missing DialogContent descriptions (accessibility)
React hydration warnings for span elements inside select/option

passed_tests: User registration and login with JWT authentication
Dashboard statistics with real-time data (4 lots, 3500 KG, ₹1.5M value)
Procurement lot creation with auto-calculations (net weight, totals, balance)
Preprocessing batch creation with yield calculation and worker tracking
Production order creation with conversion rate calculation
Finished goods inventory with cold storage details
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests), Frontend: 95% (minor console warnings only)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor React console warnings: 1) Add descriptions to DialogContent for accessibility, 2) Resolve span/select hydration warnings in form components
